title: Trámites y servicios · Forms, problems and solutions
focus: Useful A2 words for offices, documents, appointments, complaints and practical services.

words.example: En la oficina me pidieron la cita para continuar el trámite.
words.example_en: At the office they asked me for the appointment to continue the procedure.

words.example: Pregunté por la cola porque no entendía el siguiente paso.

words.translation_en: to make an appointment in advance
words.example: Para renovar el documento hay que pedir cita previa.
words.example_en: To renew the document you have to make an appointment in advance.

words.example: Antes de viajar comprueba que el pasaporte esté en regla.
words.example_en: Before travelling, check that your passport is in order.

words.example: Queda pendiente enviar la copia firmada del formulario.
words.example_en: Sending the signed copy of the form remains pending.

words.example: Lleva encima una copia del seguro por si la piden.
words.example_en: Carry a copy of the insurance in case they ask for it.

words.example: Al llegar a la oficina, saqué número y esperé mi turno.
words.example_en: When I arrived at the office, I took a queue number and waited for my turn.

words.translation_en: to go to the service window
words.example: Después de pagar la tasa, tuve que pasar por ventanilla.
words.example_en: After paying the fee, I had to go to the service window.

words.example: Mi permiso estaba caducado y no pude hacer el trámite en línea.
words.example_en: My permit was expired, and I could not complete the procedure online.
